description_long: This is a ball-peen hammer featuring a robust, cylindrical metal head with two distinct ends: one flat striking face and one rounded peen. The head is made of a dark, metallic material, likely steel, and is securely attached to a straight, medium-brown wooden handle. The handle is smooth, slightly tapered, and appears to be ergonomically shaped for a comfortable grip, with no visible texturing or grip enhancements. The hammer's head is solid and compact, with the peen end being hemispherical and the opposite end flat for striking. There are no visible brand markings, logos, or decorative elements on the hammer. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with no signs of wear, damage, or additional attachments.
description: A ball-peen hammer with a dark steel head and a smooth, straight wooden handle. The head features a flat striking face and a rounded peen, with no visible markings or wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the profile of the ball-peen head with both the flat and rounded ends visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the width of the hammer head and the rounded peen end, with the handle tapering toward the viewer.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle and the head's profile, with the flat striking face and rounded peen clearly visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the symmetrical shape of the hammer head and the alignment of the handle with the head.
attribute_handle_type: straight wooden handle, smooth, slightly tapered, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: ball-peen hammer head with one flat striking face and one rounded peen, made of dark steel
